title: crotalaria bituminosa
intro: Crotalaria bituminosa, also known as the sticky calotrope or bituminous calotrope, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to the dry regions of the Indian subcontinent and is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria bituminosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Crotalaria bituminosa can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
